title: Katawa Shoujo - Parity on Mario Paint Composer
description:
This doesn't have as much attention to detail as I usually like to put in; it's just a fun little thing I wanted to throw together after completing this VN.

Katawa Shoujo is a free visual novel by Four Leaf Studios. It follows the story of a high school boy who has a heart attack due to arrhythmia. After four months of hospitalization, he has to continue his education at a high school for disabled students. In order to put his life back together, he develops a relationship with one of the other students, learning more about both them and himself in the process. It's a very respectful and touching story that I'd recommend to anyone who likes a heartwarming tale.

Download it for free here: http://katawa-shoujo.com/download.php

This song is Rin's Theme, Parity, by Nicol Armarfi. Listen to the OST here: http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8tEcG9qpgUg

And before anyone asks, my favorite route was Lilly's.

Enjoy!
